note: Curated, adversarially-vetted Philippine cleanup organizations for the Fund-a-Cleanup pilot. The tool LINKS to each org's own/official donation page and never holds funds. status 'verified' = confirmed real, active, on-theme org with a working official/platform donation path (NOT a financial audit). 'scope' = whether the donation page funds a SPECIFIC project or the whole ORG (verified 2026-06-30: only Nature Kids of Siargao has a true project page). 'blurb' = one-line card label; 'funds' = exactly what a donation supports; 'earmark' flags broad funds.
vetted: 2026-06-30 (web vetting; financials NOT audited — see disclosures)

orgs.name: Marine Conservation Philippines
orgs.blurb: Full-time daily beach-cleanup crew in Negros
orgs.focus: Daily ocean-plastic & beach cleanups, reef and mangrove restoration, Bantay Dagat patrols
orgs.funds: MCP's general fund — pays the full-time daily beach-cleanup team (≈6M plastic pieces/yr) plus equipment, reef work and research.
orgs.evidence: PH SEC reg. #CN201506332 · own-domain donation page (PayPal/Wise/bank) with published Expenditures · independent 2025–26 cleanup activity.

orgs.name: People and the Sea
orgs.focus: Island-community beach cleanups & solid-waste management (10–15 t/mo), sustainable fishing, marine research
orgs.funds: People and the Sea's general fund (“Donate for 2026”) — beach cleanups, waste management and marine research on Malapascua.
orgs.evidence: Founded 2015 · 2024 Annual Report (89% of budget to PH programs) · donations via HelloAsso (zero-fee nonprofit platform).

orgs.name: Nature Kids of Siargao
orgs.blurb: Up-cycles ~1 tonne of plastic a month
orgs.focus: Community recycling/upcycling studio diverting ~1,000 kg/mo of plastic from jungle and ocean
orgs.funds: The specific Siargao Recycling Art Studio project — up-cycling ~1,000 kg of plastic/month into products. Project-scoped on GlobalGiving.
orgs.prefill_note: Set gg_projid to this project's numeric GlobalGiving ID (from its Share tab) to pass the picked amount through as a prefilled checkout: globalgiving.org/dy/cart/view/gg.html?cmd=addItem&projid=<ID>&frequency=ONCE&amount=<USD>.
orgs.evidence: Hosted on GlobalGiving (independent KYC/due-diligence, 'Vetted since 2024') · corroborated by Epson–WWF 'Project UPcycle' (2024).

orgs.name: ABS-CBN Lingkod Kapamilya
orgs.focus: Pasig River & estero rehabilitation and cleanups draining to Manila Bay
orgs.funds: The whole ABS-CBN Lingkod Kapamilya Foundation — which also covers child welfare and disaster relief, NOT only the river cleanup.
orgs.earmark: Goes to the whole foundation — no online way to restrict it to the cleanup. Contact them to earmark Bantay Kalikasan / Kapit Bisig para sa Ilog Pasig.
orgs.evidence: PCNC-certified 2024–2029 · 2024 Impact Report · GlobalGiving-vetted (no project-specific Pasig page exists).

orgs.name: Save Philippine Seas
orgs.focus: Marine-litter prevention & management, coastal cleanups, education (national)
orgs.funds: Save Philippine Seas' general fund — marine-litter management, coastal cleanups and ocean education across the country.
orgs.evidence: SEC-registered 2013 (Philippine Seatizens, Inc.) · founder Anna Oposa (Ashoka Fellow) · active 2024–25 programming.

orgs.name: BAN Toxics
orgs.funds: BAN Toxics' general fund — anti-plastic / zero-waste advocacy and chemicals-and-waste work. Advocacy/prevention, not field cleanup.
orgs.evidence: Established ~2006 · GEF-funded projects · own-domain donation page (PayPal + GCash).

orgs.name: Greenpeace Philippines
orgs.blurb: Systemic advocacy & brand audits · refuses corp money
orgs.focus: Plastic-pollution campaigning, Manila Bay brand audits & cleanups, refill hubs ('Kuha sa Tingi')
orgs.funds: Greenpeace PH's general campaign fund — plastics, oceans and climate (no plastic-only page exists). Systemic/advocacy, not site cleanup.
orgs.evidence: Live Stripe/Xendit PHP donation form on a greenpeace.org subdomain · refuses government & corporate money.

orgs.name: CORA (Communities Organized for Resource Allocation)
orgs.focus: Coastal cleanups, mangrove restoration, USAID Clean Cities Blue Ocean
orgs.evidence: Real, active, on-theme — but the live donation checkout (JS widget) and SEC registration are unconfirmed. In the diligence queue.

orgs.name: S.E.A. Movement (Siargao)
orgs.focus: Island beach cleanups, Plastic X-Change, upcycling
orgs.evidence: Active org, but its on-site donate page is dead (404); a HelixPay store exists and must be confirmed as org-owned before listing.

orgs.name: The Plastic Flamingo (The Plaf)
orgs.focus: Collects hard-to-recycle plastic (300+ points), recycles into eco-boards & school chairs
orgs.evidence: Social enterprise (not a charity) — its tiers are recurring subscriptions, not tax-deductible donations. Needs clear 'support a social enterprise' framing before listing.
